name: Pat's Aioli Sauce
directions: Combine all in container with lid; mix well, refrigerate several hours to mingle flavors.

name: Quick and Easy Black Bean Salsa
directions: Drain tomatoes, Ro-Tel, corn and black beans.
Add any or all of the onion, garlic, cilantro and parsley.
Be creative; use your own favorites.
Add dressing, using less than the whole bottle until the amount suits you.

name: Old Fashion Steak Sauce
directions: In oil, slowly cook minced onion til soft, don't let onion get color.
In a mixing bowl, whisk mayo, and remaining ingredients til well- combined.

name: Low-fat Tartar Sauce
directions: In a small bowl, combine all ingredients.

name: Quick Tartare Sauce (Tartar Sauce)
directions: Combine all ingredients and mix well.
Cover and chill for at least 30 minutes, to blend flavors.
Serve with hot or cold fish.
